entries.message: Fixed: folder view no longer shows 'No folders yet' when all sites are selected
Create from Template: document title and folder pre-fill from the selected template
Fixed: 'Shared from Group/Company' tag now sits below the doc name instead of squeezing it
Fixed: 'Shared from Group/Company' tag now shows at site level in table and folder views
Fixed: site cards now count group docs owned by the company in Compliant/Review totals
Fixed: group docs owned by a company were hidden on that company's own site dashboards
Fixed: Document Progress count was 0 for sites belonging to a group owner company
Fixed: shared group docs now appear in table view and dashboard dialog when filtered by site
Fixed: dashboard compliance dialog now lists shared docs counted in the compliant total
Fixed: shared/group documents were missing from the table view when a site was selected
Fixed: excluded required docs were still showing as Required/Missing in the folder view
Fixed: roadmap assignee saving confirmed working end-to-end
Fixed: assignee names weren't showing in the Roadmap assign dropdown
Roadmap items can now be assigned to an admin user
Fixed: Company column showed dashes in the EL Case Status PDF export
EL Case Status PDF: Company column added, layout and column names tidied
Fixed: Export PDF button on the EL Case Status report wasn't working
EL case source can now be edited directly from the case detail view
Fixed: Create case dialog action buttons were hidden when the form was long
Fixed: EL case sources now use the admin-configured sources list instead of a hardcoded one
EL cases now include a source field (e.g. Employee, ACAS, Solicitor) shown on the table, kanban, and report
Fixed: essential document submission date saving confirmed working
EL cases now have a kanban board view alongside the table view
New EL Case Status report added for admins and case advocates
Essential documents: submission date added; auto-creates a linked milestone that keeps both in sync
Essential document checklist items can now be linked to an existing case document
Case notes: clickable tick icon added to each note — toggles green completed state (strikethrough text, green background tint) with no persistence required
Completed milestones with notes now have a View Notes option in their menu
Fixed: EL case deadlines were showing for consultants without Case Advocate permission
EL milestones now capture a completion date and optional notes when marked done
Response Deadline renamed to ET3 Response Deadline throughout EL cases
Site docs dashboard: Company badge colour updated for better contrast
Site docs dashboard: Group, Company, and Site hierarchy badges are now colour-coded
Site docs dashboard: tiles now show Group, Company, or Site type labels with distinct styling
Fixed: EL case name can now be edited inline from the case detail header
Fixed: back button on EL case detail now returns to the cases list
EL cases now require a case name; table shows dedicated response deadline and next milestone columns
EL case ET3 response deadline is now a protected milestone that cannot be deleted
Roadmap: 'No Module' filter option added to find untagged items
Fixed: roadmap module badges weren't rendering on cards
Fixed: roadmap module tag wasn't being saved when creating an item
Fixed: roadmap module tag wasn't saving when editing an item
Roadmap items can now be tagged with a portal module (Overview, HR, H&S, EL, etc.)
Investigation report: Actions and Recommendations section moved above Conclusion
Investigation report: actions listed individually; recommendations removed from incident report
Investigation reports are redacted by default; shown unredacted only when client grants full consultant access
Incident report PDF is always redacted; investigation report and portal views show full names
Removed severity field from incident report detail view and consultant notification email
Users page role filter now includes Pro Consultants as a distinct option
Full route-level access control matrix enforced: admin-only pages redirect non-admins, template/training library requires consultant permissions, privileged-only pages redirect clients
Clients can no longer access /companies, /sites, or /users pages directly; name links on module-sites tiles are hidden for client users
Company-level missing count no longer incorrectly treats site-scoped docs as fulfilling company-level required template slots
Fix back button and breadcrumb trail when navigating from module site tiles to company or site detail pages
Group, company and site names on module site tiles are now clickable links to their detail pages; browser back button returns to tiles
Company tiles in module sites now show company-level missing count (no site exclusions) matching the company Documents page
Company scope module docs now show all required templates without per-site exclusions via a dedicated company-level missing-slots API
Group scope module docs now show missing required slots from all member company sites, not just the group owner's own sites
Portfolio panel now shows active EL cases and source tags for consultants
Fixed folder view: company-required template slots now counted in folder stats and compliance status
Changelog entries now show a date stamp and are sorted newest first within each patch
Fixed email signature alignment in .msg bundle PDFs
Added Release Notes section to admin reports
Fixed folder template selection when creating documents from a template
Support link in sidebar always shows as locked in production
Fixed: consultants blocked from saving incidents due to missing permissions check
Standard consultants and clients can now edit their own profile details
Fixed typo in phone number example on settings page
Fixed: profile changes on settings page not reflected until page refresh
Fixed: admins blocked from saving their profile due to spurious sources validation error
Updated empty folder message in template library
Removed Setup Wizard from template library
Feedback comments dialog now shows the original message at the top
Improved session expiry error message shown on file upload failure
Redesigned Template Library header — icon badge and action buttons always visible at top
Fixed: company name missing from sidebar immediately after login
Fixed: pro consultants' assigned sources not showing in company creation form
Admins can now permanently delete cases and incidents, with confirmation dialog and full audit trail
Consultants can now build and download PDF document bundles from a case's checklist items
Guardian Group logo on the login page now links to guardiangroup.co.uk
Pro consultants can now manage module access at both company and site level
Fixed: login could hang due to slow background data requests
Fixed: session timeout stays active while any tab is in use
Fixed: patch number no longer auto-increments on server restart
Fixed: company dropdown when adding a user now shows all companies, not just the first page
Fixed: all company dropdown filters now show the full company list
Fixed: company list no longer capped at 100 results
Improved: sites list now loads significantly faster
Improved: users and sites lists no longer re-fetch on first visit
Fixed: pro consultants assigned to sites now appear in the company Users list
Fixed: toolkit folder dropdown in Add Templates now always loads fresh data
Add Templates dialog now includes a Create New folder option inline
Client users are blocked from logging in when their company is On Hold or Inactive
Feedback & comments now preserve line breaks and paragraphs exactly as typed
Users can now edit their own feedback (when it has no upvotes or comments) and edit their own comments
Sites dropdown locks until a Company is selected
When a company or site address is updated, you are now prompted to copy the new address to any matching sites or the parent company
Users Report now distinguishes between Consultants and Pro Consultants — each shown with a distinct badge, colour, and separate summary count
Fixed: address updates now reflect immediately on the company's sites list
Fixed: site address on the company Sites tab now shows the full address including Address Line 2 and County
Added ACAS Conciliation as a case type in Employment Law — available in the new case form and case type filter
Admins can grant Case Advocate permission to consultants — only Case Advocates can view and manage Employment Law cases
Case Advocates only see cases matching their assigned sources
Admins can grant or revoke Template Library and Training Library access per consultant
Template and Training Library permission toggles appear in both the Permissions dialog and Create Consultant form
Fixed: non-active users are greyed out and unselectable in the Case Access dialog
Cases now have a mandatory Case Number field shown in the case list
Case Number can be edited from the case detail view; duplicates are blocked
Improved: Testing page redesigned with side-by-side panel layout for easier use
Testing: task lists can now be archived; archived view accessible from left panel
RIDDOR section moved from Report Incident form to Follow Up Investigation
Follow Up Investigation adds RIDDOR reference and notes fields
Incident detail view and PDF now display RIDDOR reference and notes
User list: new Permissions column shows colour-coded badges per consultant
User list: admin rows show an All badge in the Permissions column
User list: Case Advocate badge removed from Role cell; shown only in Permissions column
Settings: Your Permissions card moved to top with read-only permission toggles
Companies can now be linked to a Group Owner company
Group Owner companies show a Linked Companies panel with all member companies
Company list shows Group Owner and Member Of badges
Group Owner moved into Linked Companies panel — single unified section
Standalone companies now show clear options to join a group or become a Group Owner
Company list: filter by group shows the Group Owner and all its members
Patch version auto-increments on every production deployment
Patch headings now show the date of the latest entry in that patch
Template source filtering: restrict template visibility by source
Older invite links now show a clear "replaced by newer email" message
Sidebar permission-gated items now appear instantly on login (no refresh)
Dashboard now shows skeleton placeholders during initial load instead of flashing an empty state.
Dashboard now renders instantly with zeros that count up to real values
Site Documents page: filter by Group Owner with new Group + Company summary cards
Fixed: shared documents to a Group could not be uploaded
Documents button on Group/Company cards opens a list filtered to that scope
Site Documents filter bar now has an X to clear active filters
Client sign-off emails now go only to the consultant driving the approval
Companies, Sites and Users pages now share a consistent header and footer layout
Companies, Sites and Users pages now show a record count in the footer
Fixed: email document links now open the document after logging in
Activation page now shows email and username in a clear table
Activation/reset screens now use the branded login layout
Activation success screen no longer disappears when tab is refocused
Group/company documents now show a Shared list with add/remove (auto-updates compliance)
Fixed: shared-companies list crashed on group documents
Group-shared documents now appear and count for each shared company and its sites
Linked group documents now show on company document pages with a clear "Linked from Group" badge and read-only actions
Documents button on Group/Company tiles now opens a properly scoped Documents view with the Group or Company name in the header
Folders view now also respects Group/Company scope when opened from a tile, listing the scoped documents and linked items
Folder structure now also exists at Group and Company level, with auto-provisioned folders from templates and a folder selector available when uploading or creating from template in those scopes
Folders view at Group/Company scope now auto-creates the folder structure from templates and lists documents grouped by folder
Fixed folder creation so Group and Company folders are saved with the correct scope and stop showing as empty
Group Owner selection on the Site Documents pages is now remembered when navigating between modules

Shared Group/Company documents now appear inside the matching site folder with a dashed border and Shared tag, instead of in a separate Shared Documents area. Shared documents are read-only at site level and can only be edited at the parent (Group or Company) where they were created
Fixed production auto-bumping its own changelog patch on startup
Added auto-detect on Changelog: dev polls live site and bumps patch after publish
Added /api/changelog/published-patch endpoint for auto-detect
Simplified Changelog header: removed Live badge, cards show patch number only
Added User Logins report to Admin Reports
Template Library: all users with page access now have full management rights
Fixed client sign-off emails: now routes to assigned consultant before admins
Fixed User Logins report always showing zero logins
Added date-range presets to User Logins report
Added Active Users Now tile to Admin Reports
Moved Changelog / Release Notes onto its own Admin Reports sub-page
Locked Admin Reports, Active Users, User Logins and Changelog to admins only
Module Sites: replaced Overdue stat with Missing on Group and Company tiles
Fixed Missing count on Group/Company tiles to be scope-specific
Further consistency fixes to Group/Company tile stat counts
Fixed Group tile counts to load consistently alongside Company tile
Fixed required docs from member companies incorrectly bubbling up to Group tile
Fixed Site tile over-counting Compliant when group/company docs are shared
Implemented group-to-member required-template cascade (non-binding)
Removing a group required template no longer forces removal at member companies
Inherited required docs can now be individually dismissed at company level
Dismissed inherited required docs can now be re-enabled
Added GDPR name redaction option for incident report PDFs
Extended GDPR redaction to cover address fields in incident PDFs
Consultants now receive an email when a client submits an incident report
Added confirmation dialog shown to client after submitting an incident report
Added portal_messages table with full CRUD and storage layer
Added /api/home-summary endpoint returning urgent actions, portfolio, and portal messages
Added portal-messages CRUD API routes with admin/client visibility rules
Created /home portal page with greeting, urgent actions, portfolio and portal messages
Moved dashboard to /dashboard; updated sidebar Overview to link to new /home page
Added /admin/portal-messages admin page to create, edit, publish and delete messages
Fixed home page: / redirect, date greeting, client doc links, admin action buttons
Fixed home page review issues: portal message card type badges and colours
Added /api/home-summary/items endpoint for urgent action modal drill-down lists
Remove Quick Links card from home page (redundant with sidebar navigation)
Urgent Actions: clicking a metric opens a modal listing specific items with links
Redesigned My Portfolio panel with stats, client list, and site count badges
Client Account panel redesign: avatar icons, divider layout, document/incident quick-action buttons
Fixed portal message create/update: coerce ISO string timestamps before validation
Fixed PATCH portal-messages: omitted date fields no longer cause validation errors
Fixed portal messages: future-dated messages now hidden until published_at arrives
Moved Open Cases count from My Portfolio to Urgent Actions on home page
Equalised Urgent Actions and My Portfolio card heights on home page
Added toggle for clients to grant consultants full unredacted incident access
Required docs inherited from group can now be dismissed at site level
Case bundle PDF: page numbers now start at 1 (was 0-based) and render in black (was grey).
Case bundle: added .msg (Outlook email) conversion support
